summary: Iteration 27: TopTex Import Bug Fixes Testing - BOTH BUGS VERIFIED FIXED. 13/13 backend tests passed. PA4045 and K356 lookups return valid image_url from cdn.toptex.com. PDF upload uses background task pattern with task_id polling. Add-single import works correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/provider/import/lookup/PA4045 returns 200 with valid image_url containing cdn.toptex.com
GET /api/provider/import/lookup/K356 returns 200 with valid image_url containing cdn.toptex.com
Lookup returns product name, price, sizes, colors from og:image scraping
POST /api/provider/import/parse-pdf returns task_id for background processing
PDF status returns 404 for invalid task_id
PDF endpoint validates file type (rejects non-PDF)
POST /api/provider/import/add-single successfully adds lookup product to catalogue
Frontend Import TopTex tab loads correctly
Frontend lookup input and button work
Frontend shows product with image after lookup
Product appears in Catalogue after add-single import

bug_1_pdf_background_task.description: PDF upload now uses background task pattern
bug_1_pdf_background_task.test_evidence: POST /api/provider/import/parse-pdf returns {task_id, message}. GET /api/provider/import/pdf-status/{task_id} returns status and products when done.

bug_2_image_url_og_image.description: TopTex lookup extracts image_url from og:image meta tag

seed_data_creation: Added K356 product to provider catalogue via add-single endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified TopTex import bug fixes. Bug 1: PDF upload uses background task pattern - parse-pdf returns task_id, pdf-status polls for completion. Bug 2: Image URLs now correctly extracted from og:image meta tag, returning cdn.toptex.com URLs. K356 was added to catalogue during testing (now 19 products). Lookup endpoints: /api/provider/import/lookup/{ref}, /api/provider/import/add-single, /api/provider/import/parse-pdf, /api/provider/import/pdf-status/{task_id}.
